ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-15-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-17-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) TOBY SCHOOLMAN. THE MAR-15-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DISMISS THE DEMURRER IS DENIED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ANNE WILD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUE TO 8/31/11 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY BY 8/19/11, PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF TO ADVICE MOVING PARTY ABOUT THIS CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189. (301)
